name: Dialog
description: 模态对话框,基于原生 <dialog> + showModal:焦点陷阱 / Esc / 遮罩 / top-layer。Header/Title/Description/Body/Footer 子部件自动关联 aria;size(sm/md/lg/full)× placement(center/top)变体;tone 语义色 + 槽位辉光;onOpenChange 双通道、onEscapeKeyDown/onPointerDownOutside/onInteractOutside 可拦截关闭;classNames / panelProps / asChild / renderPanel 留口;closeIcon / hideCloseButton;尊重 reduced-motion 与 motion/fx 总闸

source.requirements: magic-scope overlay 首个组件:模态对话框。用满平台原生能力——原生 <dialog> + showModal() 自带焦点陷阱 / Esc / ::backdrop / top-layer;自研封装受控 open、点遮罩关闭、@starting-style + allow-discrete 入场动画(光影/动效受 fx/motion 开关控制)。
